author: Reasonian
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Embeds Reasonix (DeepSeek) as an AI collaborator in your vault. Full agentic capabilities: file read/write, search, bash commands, and multi-step workflows.

name: Reasonian

releases.author: Reject-Reality
releases.description:
Reasonian 0.1.1 community plugin update.

Release assets for Obsidian updater:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

Manual install note: Reasonix grammar wasm assets are also attached as grammars.zip for installs that need the bundled grammar directory.
releases.name: Reasonian 0.1.1

releases.author: Reject-Reality
releases.description:
### Reasonian v0.1.0

Embeds Reasonix (DeepSeek) as an AI collaborator in your Obsidian vault.

**Features**: Sidebar chat, DeepSeek V4, file/shell/web tools, inline editing, Plan mode, session persistence, custom prompts, long-term memory.
